$recordId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'date', 'courseName', 'duration', 'createdAt', 'createdByUid']) && newData.child('id').isString() && newData.child('date').isString() && newData.child('courseName').isString() && newData.child('duration').isNumber() && newData.child('createdAt').isString() && newData.child('createdByUid').val() === auth.uid

$giftId..write: auth != null && ((!newData.exists() && (root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val() === $recipientId || root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/usernameGiftId').val() === $recipientId)) || (newData.exists() && newData.child('senderGiftId').val() === root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val() && ($recipientId === newData.child('recipientWalletId').val() || $recipientId === newData.child('recipientUsernameId').val())))
$giftId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['v', 'createdAt', 'giftKind', 'viewOnly', 'canMeditate', 'canUnlockMissions', 'to', 'from', 'orb', 'senderGiftId']) && newData.child('giftKind').val() === 'blessing-copy' && newData.child('viewOnly').val() === true && newData.child('canMeditate').val() === false && newData.child('canUnlockMissions').val() === false

$giftId..write: auth != null && newData.child('senderGiftId').val() === $senderId && (root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val() === $senderId || root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val() === newData.child('recipientWalletId').val() || root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/usernameGiftId').val() === newData.child('recipientUsernameId').val())

auth != null && ((newData.exists() && ($recipientId === newData.child('recipientWalletId').val() || $recipientId === newData.child('recipientUsernameId').val())) || (!newData.exists() && (root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val() === $recipientId || root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/usernameGiftId').val() === $recipientId)))

auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('audit/createdByUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('senderGiftId').val() === root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val()) || (data.exists() && (data.child('audit/createdByUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('recipientWalletId').val() === root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/walletGiftId').val() || data.child('recipientUsernameId').val() === root.child('userBindings/' + auth.uid + '/usernameGiftId').val())))
